v2BaseDropin.harness: frontend/private-dropin.html (REAL TransformersJSEngine + worker) + getUserMedia WAV injection
v2BaseDropin.transcript: A. Like. Told Wild Tales to frightened him.
v2BaseDropin.truth: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.
v2BaseDropin.note: Real engine, real injected audio. Non-empty transcript. Shares the leading-word onset glitch with v4 ('They' -> 'A.'/'day.').

findings: v4 (whisper-tiny.en) decodes to NON-EMPTY transcript in a real browser on WebGPU (fp32 AND q4) and on WASM (stable + bundled-dev).
Reverses prior headless verdict (test stt_v4r_fp32_lifecycle: WASM 'invalid data location: undefined for input a'). That regression is HEADLESS/ENV-specific, not universal.
WebGPU + q4 decoder is the practical config: small + fastest decode (1624ms), bypasses #28306 missing-scale entirely.
v2 base.en decodes through the REAL app engine (TransformersJSEngine+worker) with injected audio: non-empty transcript.

verificationLadder.L1_model_runtime_probe: v4 PASS (webgpu fp32+q4); v2 base PASS
verificationLadder.L2_real_engine_dropin: v2 base PASS (real TransformersJSEngine+worker); v4 NOT DONE (no v4 dropin)
verificationLadder.L3_full_authenticated_app: v2 base PASS (test agent, 100% h1_6, mockAuth=false); v4 NOT DONE

caveats: v4 is probe-level (L1) only; app engine (L2) and full authenticated app (L3) NOT yet proven.
One browser (Apple Silicon). WASM-on-full-browser != WASM-on-headless. WebGPU is the robust lever.
One fixture (h1_6). No multi-fixture WER/latency matrix for v4 yet.
nextProof: Test agent: run FULL AUTHENTICATED v4 WebGPU lifecycle (load->record->transcript->stop/save->detail) with the PROOF-HARDEN audio-validity gate; reconcile headless env.
